title: Tool Policy
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 5 — Agent/profile-specific allowed tool categories and write scopes. Enforced by DamageControl.before_tool_call() as a hard gate before execution.

policy_id.description: Unique policy identifier referenced by DEP-RUN-001 profiles and DEP-RUN-002 agent contracts.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this policy permits.

applies_to_agent_types.description: Agent types this policy applies to. If omitted, applies to all agents under the referencing profile.

applies_to_profile_ids.description: Profile IDs this policy applies to.

allowed_tool_categories.description: Tool policy_tags (from DEP-RUN-003) that agents under this policy may invoke.

denied_tool_ids.description: Explicit tool_id deny list. Overrides category-level allow.

allowed_write_scopes.description: Glob patterns for filesystem paths agents may write to under this policy.

allowed_memory_domains.description: Memory domains agents may write to under this policy.
